mission.title: argo-events: Message distribution across partitions when using Kafka EventBus
mission.description: Message distribution across partitions when using Kafka EventBus. This issue affects 6+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo-events troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo-events deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review argo-events configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events
```
Argo Events is using the trigger name as the Kafka message key for all messages produced by a sensor

Since all sensor replicas have the same trigger name, all messages end up with the same key

In Kafka, messages with the same key are routed to the

steps.title: Apply the fix for Message distribution across partitions when using Kafka…
steps.description:
This PR resolves https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/3695

1. Adds an optional field `spec.kafka.partitioner` to the **EventBus** CRD to select the Kafka producer partitioning mode: `random`, `hash`, `roundrobin`, or `manual`. 

2. Changes default partitioner mode from `hash` to `random`

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Message distribution across partitions when using… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This PR resolves https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/3695

1. Adds an optional field `spec.kafka.partitioner` to the **EventBus** CRD to select the Kafka producer partitioning mode: `random`, `hash`, `roundrobin`, or `manual`. 

2. Changes default partitioner mode from `hash` to `random`

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible.
